films.title: Fresh
films.overview: Frustrated at not finding love in silly dating apps, she meets a man in the supermarket who could be her downfall

films.title: Asterix & Obelix: God Save Britannia
films.overview: Asterix crosses the channel to help second-cousin Anticlimax face down Julius Caesar and invading Romans.

films.title: Mood Indigo
films.overview: A woman suffers from an unusual illness caused by a flower growing in her lungs.

films.title: The Hundred-Foot Journey
films.overview: A story centered around an Indian family who moves to France and opens a restaurant across the street from a Michelin-starred French restaurant.

films.title: Yves Saint Laurent
films.overview: A look at the life of French designer Yves Saint Laurent from the beginning of his career in 1958 when he met his lover and business partner, Pierre Berge.

films.title: Nice and Easy
films.overview: Sebastian has one ambition in life: to do nothing. His horizon is his couch. His life he does not want to live but contemplate. But today, if you do nothing - You are nothing. So driven by his two roommates, that chain internships and odd jobs, decided to Anna and not quite decided Bruno, Sebastien will have to - A little.

films.title: The Walk
films.overview: The story of French high-wire artist Philippe Petit's attempt to cross the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in 1974.

films.title: Bastille Day
films.overview: Michael Mason is an American pickpocket living in Paris who finds himself hunted by the CIA when he steals a bag that contains more than just a wallet. Sean Briar, the field agent on the case, soon realises that Michael is just a pawn in a much bigger game and is also his best asset to uncover a large-scale conspiracy.

films.title: The Promise
films.overview: Set during the last days of the Ottoman Empire, a love triangle develops between Mikael, a brilliant medical student, the beautiful and sophisticated artist Ana, and Chris, a renowned American journalist based in Paris.

films.title: Realive
films.overview: Marc, a successful, ambitious man, is diagnosed with terminal cancer, and is given a few months to live.  Unable to accept death, he decides to cryogenically freeze himself. The love of his life is devastated. Seventy years later, Marc becomes the first cryogenic resuscitated person in history. But this doesn't happen in the idealized way he dreamt of.

films.title: In the Shadow of Iris
films.overview: The sudden disappearance of a wealthy banker's wife cracks open a dizzying world of secret fetishes, desperate acts and elaborate deceptions.

films.title: Anthropoid
films.overview: In December 1941, Czech soldiers Jozef Gabčík and Jan Kubiš parachute into their occupied homeland to assassinate Nazi officer Reinhard Heydrich.
